title: Bedroom Parameter Manifest
description: Parametric controls for COGS 160 VR Bedroom pipeline.

ceiling_height_m.description: Vertical distance from floor to ceiling.
ceiling_height_m.rationale: Ceiling height primes different levels of mental abstraction.

lighting_warmth.rationale: Spectral composition affects melatonin and circadian health.

enclosure.description: The degree of perceived physical containment.
enclosure.rationale: Enclosure impacts beauty judgments and approach-avoidance decisions.

window_view_complexity.description: Visual density and fractal dimension of the exterior view.
window_view_complexity.rationale: Restorative environments require a view with soft fascination to recover from cognitive fatigue.

wall_texture_organicism.description: Ratio of organic/fractal textures (wood/stone) to synthetic flats.
wall_texture_organicism.rationale: Biophilic design suggests organic textures reduce stress compared to synthetic surfaces.

room_volume_m3.description: Total spatial volume of the room.
room_volume_m3.rationale: Spaciousness impacts the sense of control and wellness in private spaces.
